chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1254 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Priority Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 5298/23 3.For hearing of main case. 12-12-2023 Mr. Sikandar Ali Junejo, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G a/w Shafi Muhammad, PDSP on behalf of SSP, Sukkur, Inspector Muhammad Akhtar on behalf of DIGP, Sukkur, SIP Jameel Ahmed on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and SIP Zulfiqar Ali Ujjan on behalf of DIGP, Shaheed Benazirabad. ***** Comments have been filed and it has been verified that on the date of interview, petitioner was present, the report of Biometric verifies the same, but she strangely was marked absent in the interview which does not appeal to common sense. We find the report filed by Selection Committee as misleading. But, in any case, the Selection Committee is directed to conduct interview of the petitioner afresh on the basis of her qualification of written test within 20-days and submit compliance report. Meanwhile, incharge, Selection Committee who has filed report shall also be present on the next date of hearing to explain position. Adjourned to 17.01.2024. Office to supply a copy of this order to the office to AAG for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
